structure: 3 long-bull (BNB/TRX/BCH) + 3 crash-short (AAVE/SOL/DOT), LOOSE gates (close>ema50 + BTC>ema50, no ema stack), TP=1800bps, mult=3.0 long/2.5 short, 9/8 legs, equal-weighted
acceptance_reason: BREAKTHROUGH: first real frontier with ann>20% AND DD<30% (ann 26.5%, DD 21.0%). High TP (1800bps) is the key lever: longer-held cycles profit more from trends and stop out less, lowering DD while keeping ann. Multi-symbol, live-parity.
